content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Demand Planning discovery session. New haircare launch or existing SKU?
New launch — bond-repair leave-in cream, two SKUs (travel 75mL + full size 150mL).
Salon distribution first, then Ulta within 6 months. 5,000 full-size, 2,000 travel units.
Holiday gift sets spike in Q4. Key active (bis-aminopropyl dimaleate) has 8-10 week lead from one EU supplier.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
